title: rubus coriifrons
intro: Rubus coriifrons, also known as the Coralberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the southeastern United States. The medicinal properties of Rubus coriifrons lie in its leaves, which contain anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Rubus coriifrons can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
